title: Create: Colored (Updated)
description: Simply a fork of Create: Colored and exists to serve the updated version of their mod.
body:
# Create: Colored (Updated) - ![Create: Colored (Updated) Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/create-colored-(updated))

As stated by the [original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-colored), Create: Colored aims to add variants to various blocks in create, more information about the license and full description of why this exists is at the bottom of this page.

This fork also adds a few QOL fixes and support for Create 6.0.8.


# All Features
As a quick run-down, this mod simply adds
- Colored Pipes
- Colored Tanks
   - Colored Boiler Gauge

Colored blocks will not connect to other colored blocks, unless they are strictly forced to. This allows you to have setups where a colored pipe runs next to another colored tank and they don't connect.
## Colored Tanks
### Windows
![Colored Tanks - Windowed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3HtyqWq/images/4511249ecdb63f77d5ef4f7a2c6238ffc9a8b1e3.png)

### No Windows
![Colored Tanks - Windowless](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3HtyqWq/images/b5db196151227259943bb7e4f4121de7a54f92e5.png)

## Colored Pipes
![Colored Pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3HtyqWq/images/8e75d565e047af02b2f8c9f41830007e12635856.png)

## Cross-over Example
This shows how a colored block only connects to other colored blocks, unless you force it to.
![Connection Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y3HtyqWq/images/424179657f5804dc1aee80e30504a3e5e94f2df9.png)

## License Disclaimer

This mod is not an offical fork of the [Create: Colored](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-colored) mod although it follows the MIT license that they set.

All previous work was done by [AzaSad](https://modrinth.com/user/AzaSad) and I have simply
- Updated the mod to Create 6.0.8
- Fixed boiler gauges not being colored
- Re-did all of the textures to fit with Create 6.0.8

I do have plans to continue adding a few features that I wished to see, although if the original mod creator comes back this fork will be archived.

This fork only exists because I tried to push a PR to the original mod but after 2 weeks of radio silence I decided to upload this fork.
